headline: Citigroup Stock Up as Q2 Earnings Beat on Higher NII & Fee Income
summary: C stock gains nearly 1.8% in early trading after Q2 earnings beat estimates on higher NII, fee growth and gains across all five core businesses.

raw.headline: Citigroup Stock Up as Q2 Earnings Beat on Higher NII & Fee Income
raw.summary: C stock gains nearly 1.8% in early trading after Q2 earnings beat estimates on higher NII, fee growth and gains across all five core businesses.

headline: Wells Fargo Q2 Earnings Beat on NII & Fee Income Growth, Stock Up
summary: WFC stock gains nearly 1.5% in early trading after Q2 earnings beat estimates, aided by higher NII, fee income and lower provisions despite higher expenses.

raw.headline: Wells Fargo Q2 Earnings Beat on NII & Fee Income Growth, Stock Up
raw.summary: WFC stock gains nearly 1.5% in early trading after Q2 earnings beat estimates, aided by higher NII, fee income and lower provisions despite higher expenses.

headline: NII, Loan Growth to Aid CFG's Q2 Earnings Amid Expense Pressures
summary: Citizens Financial heads toward Q2 earnings release with expected NII, loan and fee growth, while higher expenses and credit provisions remain key watchpoints.

raw.headline: NII, Loan Growth to Aid CFG's Q2 Earnings Amid Expense Pressures
raw.summary: Citizens Financial heads toward Q2 earnings release with expected NII, loan and fee growth, while higher expenses and credit provisions remain key watchpoints.

headline: Loan Growth, Fee Income Strength to Support Truist's Q2 Earnings
summary: TFC's Q2 earnings are likely to have benefited from loan growth and stronger fee income, even as expenses and non-performing assets weigh on performance.

raw.headline: Loan Growth, Fee Income Strength to Support Truist's Q2 Earnings
